name: com.doomscrollr/mcp
title: DOOMSCROLLR
description: DOOMSCROLLR MCP server for AI agents: build owned-audience websites, publish posts, create products, manage subscribers, connect RSS/Pinterest, and run creator commerce workflows.

environmentVariables.name: DOOMSCROLLR_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Your DOOMSCROLLR API key. Get one free at https://doomscrollr.com/dashboard (Settings → API keys).

environmentVariables.name: DOOMSCROLLR_API_BASE
environmentVariables.description: Optional API base URL override. Defaults to https://doomscrollr.com/api/v1.

DOOMSCROLLR_API_KEY.description: Your DOOMSCROLLR API key from https://doomscrollr.com/dashboard (Settings → API keys).
